name: gatekeeper
description: Pre-adoption trust check for external artifacts before they touch your system: skill/MCP installs, GitHub repos, URLs/documents, on-chain addresses, DeFi protocol governance/admin risk, products/services, social shares. Triggers on /gatekeeper, /slowmist-agent-security (alias), "is this safe to install", "check this repo", "看這個協議的中央化風險".
author: evilcos
